title: pteris podophylla f. genuina
intro: Pteris podophylla f. genuina, also known as the true bracken fern, is a type of fern native to East Asia, characterized by its dark green, lacy fronds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing and reducing fever. The health benefits of Pteris podophylla f. genuina include its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its potential to prevent certain types of cancer. Pteris podophylla f. genuina is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be made by steeping the dried fronds in hot water.
